children.name: ParseCommand
children.purpose: Validate and parse the command string to determine the operation type.
children.behavior: Check that command is one of 'place', 'cancel', 'track'. If invalid, return error.

constraints.description: Must return error for invalid command strings

children.stop_reason: Pure validation function with no side effects

children.name: PlaceOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'place' command: validate items, charge payment, reserve inventory, create order, send notification.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions for each step; if any fails, rollback previous steps.

constraints.description: Must rollback all writes if any step fails
Must validate item availability before charging payment

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid order_data, creates order with status 'placed'
Given insufficient inventory, returns error and no side effects

children.stop_reason: Complex multi-step operation requiring further decomposition

children.name: CancelOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'cancel' command: verify order exists and not shipped, refund payment, restore inventory, update status.
children.behavior: Sequentially call child functions; rollback on failure.

global_vars.description: Read order status, update to cancelled
Read payment record, update to refunded

data_operations.description: Read order, update status to cancelled
Read payment, update status to refunded

constraints.description: Must verify order exists and is not shipped before cancelling
Must rollback all writes if any step fails

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid order_id, cancels order and refunds payment
Given already shipped order, returns error and no changes

children.stop_reason: Complex multi-step operation requiring further decomposition

children.name: TrackOrder
children.purpose: Execute the 'track' command: retrieve order status and estimated delivery time.
children.behavior: Query orders database for order_id, return status and delivery estimate.

global_vars.description: Read order status and delivery info

constraints.description: Must return error if order_id not found

acceptance_criteria.description: Given valid order_id, returns status and delivery time

children.stop_reason: Simple read-only query with no side effects

governance_notes: Parent global state conservation verified: orders (read_write) covered by CancelOrder (read_write) and TrackOrder (read) and PlaceOrder (write); inventory (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (read_write) and CancelOrder (read_write); payments (read_write) covered by PlaceOrder (write) and CancelOrder (read_write). ParseCommand has no data dependencies. All parent required operations are satisfied across children.
